import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut sp = true
    while sp and i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        if v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 13 or v == 10
          i = i + 1
        else
          sp = false
        end
      when None
        sp = false
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        if v == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if v == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading and i < n
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(v)
          if v >= 48 and v <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (v - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn intersect_sorted(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
        result = sorted_insert(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

mut line1 = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  line1 = s
when None
  line1 = ""
end

mut line2 = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  line2 = s
when None
  line2 = ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let result = intersect_sorted(a, b)

if result.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  println(format_list(result))
end
